metadata.description: Agent Wallet skills for the t2000 stack — gasless USDC sends, Cetus swaps, and x402 paid-API access on Sui.

plugins.name: t2000-agent-wallet
plugins.description: Drive a non-custodial Sui Agent Wallet: fund, check balance, send (gasless USDC/USDsui), swap any token via Cetus, discover x402 services, and pay any API in USDC. Includes the MCP wiring + the cross-cutting AGENTS.md ops layer.
